summary: Iteration 15/16 review: Verified Sportmonks Pro plan data wiring (weather/tv/referees), Standings endpoint + UI, Match-momentum endpoint + AttackMomentum left rail component, and API-Sports basketball lazy stats fetch. All 9 spec items verified across backend (7/7 pytest) and frontend (Playwright on Flamengo vs Palmeiras).
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Spec mentioned stats dict containing keys 'Field Goals'/'Free Throws' but implementation normalises to snake_case (field_goals, threepoint_goals, freethrows_goals). Data is correct & richer (incl. total/attempts/percentage breakdown). Frontend should adapt rendering accordingly.
/app/backend/ingestion.py is 2060 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting per provider (sportmonks/apisports/statpal).

Some basketball matches lack api_sports_game_id (94/411 in DB) — these will silently skip lazy stats fetch. Sample basketball match 878f188e... from the brief has no api_sports_game_id; tests use 4e83d710-6da9-4c17-93ad-61e5e875b12e (BSN) which does.

verification_evidence.standings_endpoint: Flamengo vs Palmeiras returns 20 Serie A rows; highlight_team_ids contains both team ids; Palmeiras #1 (38pts) and Flamengo #2 (31pts) highlighted in lime rgba(163,230,53,0.08).
verification_evidence.momentum_endpoint: Returns {momentum:[], home_team_id, away_team_id} shape; 404 on unknown match.
verification_evidence.pro_fields_persisted: match.weather={temperature_celcius:21.99, type:'broken clouds', icon:'h04d.png', humidity:'88%', wind:2.06}; tv_stations=['Bet365','Fanatiz']; referees=[{name:'Davi de Oliveira Lacerda', type:'Referee'}, ...]; matchfacts populated.
verification_evidence.basketball_lazy_fetch: GET /api/matches/4e83d710...?refresh=1 triggers fetch_game_statistics + _upsert_apisports_team_stats; subsequent GET returns statistics:[home_row, away_row] with stats dict containing field_goals, threepoint_goals, freethrows_goals, rebounds, assists, steals, blocks, turnovers.
verification_evidence.frontend_hero_chips: data-testid='hero-weather' shows '21.99°C broken clouds'; hero-tv shows 'Bet365, Fanatiz'; hero-ref shows 'Davi de Oliveira Lacerda'.
verification_evidence.frontend_attack_momentum: Left rail renders 'Attack momentum · Will appear minute-by-minute once play starts' empty state for past matches.
verification_evidence.frontend_tabs: 5 tabs rendered for football: tab-lineups, tab-stats, tab-events, tab-h2h, tab-standings. NBA SPORT_TABS map uses 'Playoffs' label (basketball_nba override). StandingsTable lazy-loads /api/matches/{id}/standings and shows 20 rows with both competing teams highlighted in lime.

seed_data_creation: None — used existing ingested data (Flamengo vs Palmeiras Serie A match and BSN basketball match 4e83d710...).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration15.py covers standings, momentum, Pro fields, and basketball lazy stats. Football sample match: 44511de4-79b4-46cd-811f-7679ec806ef1. Basketball match with api_sports_game_id: 4e83d710-6da9-4c17-93ad-61e5e875b12e (BSN). For AttackMomentum live-data verification, a currently-LIVE football match with pressure[] populated is required — couldn't verify SVG bar rendering on past matches (empty state only).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 spec items verified end-to-end.
